_comment_top: QVAC Cockpit serve config. Defines the models the Settings picker offers, ALL with tools:true + toolsMode:static (required for external harnesses like Hermes/OpenClaw: 'dynamic' leaks tool calls as text, 'auto' 503s). Start: qvac serve openai -c <thispath> --model <alias> (default port 11434). The cockpit restarts the serve with a different --model alias when you switch models in Settings.
_comment_reasoning: reasoning_budget:0 disables Qwen3 thinking (it hurt tool-calling under toolsMode:static in the OpenCode/Hermes tests). Turn on only for a reasoning-specific demo.
